positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a soaring mountain alpaca silhouette against a vibrant sunset gradient. The alpaca should be captured in a dynamic, leaping pose, forming a strong, clean profile. The background uses a palette of deep indigo, coral pink, and burnt orange, stylized like retro-pop art. The overall composition is perfectly centered, allowing the main silhouette to dominate the space. The artwork must maintain high contrast for optimal apparel printing, using thick, solid color blocking and clean vector lines, suitable for screen printing. Flat graphic design style, high detail, isolated subject, clean background.
negative: text, watermark, logo, artifact, blurry, noisy, grain, low resolution, signature, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, gradient noise
